title: West Bengal University of Health Sciences Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: West Bengal University of Health Sciences Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: West Bengal University of Health Sciences (WBUHS) Result 2026 out for B.Sc Operation Theatre Technology Part II, B.Sc Critical Care Technology Part II and Post Basic B.Sc Nursing Part I examinations on the official website - wbuhs.ac.in on 13-04-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the WBUHS result.

content.text: West Bengal University of Health Sciences (WBUHS), Kolkata has officially released the WBUHS Exam Result 2026 for B.Sc Operation Theatre Technology (O.T.T.) Part II, B.Sc Critical Care Technology (C.C.T.) Part II, and Post Basic B.Sc Nursing Part I examinations held in the December 2025 - January 2026 and November - December 2025 sessions. These newly published results cover allied health science and nursing courses, allowing students to check their course-wise result status online through the university examination portal.

WBUHS Result 2026 has been announced online on the official website - wbuhs.ac.in. Students can visit the WBUHS examination results page or the Charaka result portal, select the relevant course result, and log in using their registration number, roll number, date of birth, or other required credentials to view and download their scorecard. After downloading the provisional result, candidates should verify their name, registration details, course, part/semester, and marks carefully, and contact the university or their college in case of any discrepancy.

sections.heading: West Bengal University of Health Sciences Results 2026 Key Highlights

content.text: WBUHS has updated its examination results page with the latest allied health and nursing results published on 13 April 2026, including B.Sc OTT Part II, B.Sc CCT Part II, and Post Basic B.Sc Nursing Part I. The university provides access through the main examination results page and the Charaka student result system, where students can check their course results using login details and download the online marksheet for reference.

sections.heading: West Bengal University of Health Sciences Result 2026 Direct Link

content.text: WBUHS has activated the direct links to check the latest examination results for B.Sc OTT Part II, B.Sc CCT Part II, and Post Basic B.Sc Nursing Part I on its official results portal. Students can use the links below to open the WBUHS examination results page or Charaka portal and instantly view or download their result by selecting the correct course and entering valid login credentials.

sections.heading: Steps to Check WBUHS Exam Result 2026

content.text: Students can follow the steps below to check WBUHS Exam Result 2026 for the latest allied health and nursing examinations online.

items: Visit the official website of West Bengal University of Health Sciences at wbuhs.ac.in and open the "Examination Results" section, or directly go to https://wbuhs.ac.in/examination-results/.
On the results page, look for the published notification for B.Sc OTT Part II, B.Sc CCT Part II, or Post Basic B.Sc Nursing Part I result dated 13-04-2026.
Click on the relevant result link, which will redirect you to the Charaka student result portal.
Select the correct examination or course from the available options on the result page.
Enter your registration number, roll number, date of birth, or any other required credentials correctly.
Click on the submit or view result button to display your WBUHS scorecard on the screen.
Download and print the provisional marksheet for future reference, and verify all personal and academic details carefully.
